banner_widening.reason: P0.3 confirmed banner_status=missing across SKILL.md / constraints.yaml / MANUAL_WALKTHROUGH.md
banner_widening.insertion_rule: Insert single banner-template line announcing paper-fidelity miss for dark-su3 model. Insertion location: anywhere within the dark-su3 model section of demo/SKILL.md; widen scope-guard line allow-list at edit time and record exact line.

hash_basket_note: Plan referenced two phantom paths (_shared/analytic_models/dark_su3.py and _shared/backends/analytic.py). Sonnet recorded ABSENT sentinels under hashes[*] and the real five filepaths under five_hashes. Downstream consumers MUST read five_hashes for hash-diff comparisons.
weak_drift_gate_note: n_points changes the t_eval grid only; Y_final is solver-determined. G3 / drift gate at n=400/800 will always equal n=200 to float64. Treat drift gate as smoke check, not regression.
